name: std-healthcare
description: Healthcare clinic: patients, appointments, intake forms, prescriptions, dashboard. Composed from std atoms (Browse/Modal/Confirmation/Search/Filter/Stats/Graphs/Calendar) with email + SMS + storage services.

emits.description: Fired when the BrowseItem collection finishes loading; payload.data holds the (possibly paginated) slice and totalCount holds the unsliced filter total. totalCount is optional so compiled-path emitters that haven't been migrated yet still validate
Fired when the BrowseItem collection fails to load
Fired when CalendarEvent finishes loading; payload.data holds the events
Fired when CalendarEvent fails to load

children.content: Patient stats, graphs, and the appointment calendar live on their respective pages.
